# predicate(forTransactionTypes:)

**Type Method**

Returns a predicate that matches any of the provided transaction types.

## Declaration

```swift
static func predicate(forTransactionTypes transactionTypes: [TransactionType]) -> Predicate<Transaction>
```

## Parameters

- **transactionTypes**: Transaction types to match against.

## Type Methods

- **predicate(forMerchantCategoryCodes:)**: A predicate that returns transactions that match any of the provided merchant category codes.
- **predicate(forStatuses:)**: Returns a predicate that matches any of the provided transaction statuses.
